prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all Go source files in kubernetes/kubernetes that define the scheduler framework plugin extension points: the PreFilter, Filter, PreScore, Score, Reserve, Permit, PreBind, Bind, and PostBind interfaces and their registration in the scheduler framework.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the kubernetes-ecosystem fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Find all Go source files in kubernetes/kubernetes that define the scheduler framework plugin extension points: the PreFilter, Filter, PreScore, Score, Reserve, Permit, PreBind, Bind, and PostBind interfaces and their registration in the scheduler framework.

params.search_pattern: PreFilter OR PreScore OR PreBind OR PostBind
